mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_REACT_DEPLOY_HIS ( DEPLOY_ID, CODE_ID, DEPLOY_MODE, DEPLOY_STATUS, FAIL_REASON, PR_URL, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{deployId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{codeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deployMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deployStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{failReason,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{prUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateDtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

sql.if: AND ( c.CODE_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' ESCAPE '\' OR c.CREATE_USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' ESCAPE '\' )

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, inner_q.* FROM ( SELECT c.CODE_ID AS codeId, c.FIGMA_URL AS figmaUrl, c.CREATE_USER_ID AS createUserId, c.APPROVAL_USER_ID AS approvalUserId, c.APPROVAL_DTIME AS approvalDtime, h.DEPLOY_STATUS AS lastDeployStatus, h.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastDeployDtime, h.DEPLOY_MODE AS lastDeployMode, h.PR_URL AS lastPrUrl FROM FWK_REACT_CODE_HIS c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CODE_ID, DEPLOY_STATUS, DEPLOY_MODE, PR_URL, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CODE_ID ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DTIME DESC) AS latest_rn FROM FWK_REACT_DEPLOY_HIS ) h ON c.CODE_ID = h.CODE_ID AND h.latest_rn = 1 WHERE c.STATUS = 'APPROVED'
ORDER BY c.APPROVAL_DTIME DESC ) inner_q WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rn > #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_REACT_CODE_HIS c WHERE c.STATUS = 'APPROVED'

sql.if: AND ( h.CODE_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' ESCAPE '\' OR h.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' ESCAPE '\' )

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, inner_q.* FROM ( SELECT h.DEPLOY_ID AS deployId, h.CODE_ID AS codeId, h.DEPLOY_MODE AS deployMode, h.DEPLOY_STATUS AS deployStatus, h.FAIL_REASON AS failReason, h.PR_URL AS prUrl, h.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, h.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime FROM FWK_REACT_DEPLOY_HIS h
ORDER BY h.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME DESC ) inner_q WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rn > #{offset}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, inner_q.* FROM ( SELECT h.DEPLOY_ID AS deployId, h.CODE_ID AS codeId, h.DEPLOY_MODE AS deployMode, h.DEPLOY_STATUS AS deployStatus, h.FAIL_REASON AS failReason, h.PR_URL AS prUrl, h.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, h.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime FROM FWK_REACT_DEPLOY_HIS h WHERE h.CODE_ID = #{codeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY h.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME DESC ) inner_q WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rn > #{offset}
